items.title: Grok Build Uploaded Entire Git Repositories to xAI Storage, Not Just Files It Read
items.summary:
xAI's Grok Build coding CLI was uploading entire Git repositories, full commit history and all, to a Google Cloud Storage bucket run by xAI, not just the files a coding task needed.

items.title: SAP warns of critical flaws in NetWeaver and Commerce Cloud
items.summary: SAP has addressed 16 vulnerabilities across multiple products as part of its July 2026 security updates, including three critical flaws in NetWeaver, Commerce Cloud, and AppRouter. [...]
